title: Refactoring Puffer 5C: Cleaning Up Code Bloat and Async Rollout Debugging
summary: Refactored the Puffer 5C codebase, focusing on reducing line count and eliminating bloat in core files. Debugged the async rollout experimental feature, discussed its one-epoch stale policy and performance trade-offs, and reviewed LLM-generated code for quality. Used Grok for faster code review. Also played NetHack briefly.
